groups.rationale: Unique definition; no other definition is a strict paraphrase of this concept.

groups.canonical: Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System
groups.rationale: Unique reference title; no other reference is the same work.

groups.canonical: Bitcoin creation by Satoshi Nakamoto in 2008
groups.rationale: Unique historical claim; no other claim states the same proposition.
Unique entity; not strictly equivalent to any claim or reference.
Unique comparative claim; no other claim is a strict paraphrase.
Unique claim about reward timing and amount; distinct from mining process.
Unique method description; not the same as any reward-schedule claim.
Unique historical claim; no other item states the same timeline.
Unique definition term; no other definition is a strict paraphrase.

groups.canonical: Ethereum transition to Proof of Stake via The Merge
groups.rationale: Unique protocol-change claim; distinct from its energy-consumption outcome.
Unique result claim; not equivalent to the transition event itself.
Unique result; distinct from the earlier TVL peak and from the TVL metric.
Unique historical claim; not a paraphrase of the later decline.
Unique metric term; different category from claims about its movement.

groups.canonical: Uniswap pioneered the automated market maker model
groups.rationale: Unique historical claim; distinct from the AMM definition and Uniswap volume result.
Unique quantitative result; no other result states the same fact.
Unique definition; not equivalent to claims about Uniswap pioneering it.

groups.canonical: SEC classification of cryptocurrencies as securities with Bitcoin and Ethereum exceptions
groups.rationale: Unique regulatory claim; distinct from the Ripple case outcome.

groups.canonical: Programmatic token sales on exchanges not necessarily securities transactions
groups.rationale: Unique legal-result claim; not the same as the case citation or broader SEC classification claim.
Unique legal reference; distinct from the ruling's substantive outcome.
